text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I enter this space. The angled lights and reflections give the scene an otherworldly quality—like stepping through a threshold into a domain of possibility. The words on the exhibit provoke introspection; they speak of confusion and rhythm, of comfort in ambiguity. Here, in a room devoted to research and development, I feel both observer and participant, my inner philosopher stirred by the promise that meaning is found not at the start, but emerging quietly from experience.
